tutorial1: This tab allows you to predict rent prices and gather comprehensive information about apartments in different neighborhoods, helping you make informed decisions. It provides a detailed living cost analysis to determine whether you can afford to live in a specific area, lists available amenities, and offers direct links to reputable real estate websites. Additionally, you have access to an AI model specifically trained to answer all your questions about the chosen neighborhood.
tutorial2: Start by selecting a college from the list. Click here and choose the college you're interested in.
tutorial3: Once you've selected a college, click here to choose one of its campuses. This helps narrow down your search and provides more relevant results.
tutorial4: Now, let's choose a neighbourhood! Click here to pick one and explore valuable information about it.
tutorial5: The neighborhoods are conveniently organized based on the travel time to the chosen campus using public transit, simplifying your decision-making process.
tutorial6: Select the type of apartment you're interested in to predict the monthly rent. Click here and choose from the available options.
tutorial7: Click here to pick the date for which you want the rent prediction.
tutorial8: Navigate to the Compare tab to view and analyze various apartments in different neighborhoods side by side. This feature assists you in comparing options and making more informed choices.
tutorial9: Explore detailed visual insights in the Graphs tab, where you can access a variety of graphs and reports that assist you in comprehending trends, such as which neighborhoods are most popular and which apartments within these neighborhoods are the most sought-after.
tutorial11: Now, let's choose your first neighbourhood! Click here to pick one and explore valuable information about it.
tutorial12: Now, let's choose your second neighbourhood! Click here to pick one and explore valuable information about it.
tutorial13: Select the type of apartment for your first neighbourhood you're interested in to predict the monthly rent. Click here and choose from the available options.
tutorial14: Select the type of apartment for your second neighbourhood you're interested in to predict the monthly rent. Click here and choose from the available options.
tutorial15: Select the neighbourhood for which you want to see a graph and a PDF report.
tutorial16: Enter the password we provided for you to see the reports.
tutorial10: You've reached the end of the tutorial! Feel free to explore more and access this tutorial again if you have any questions!
